document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number and consignor matches invoice issuer
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate remarks field contains 'CAW009834 / SI051070'. Invoice shows INVOICE NO SI051070 and OUR REF CAW009834. Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' matches invoice issuer. Pairing is unambiguous.

criteria_met: Certificate reference CAW009834/SI051070 matches invoice number SI051070 and ref CAW009834
Certificate consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' matches invoice issuer 'Elof Hansson Trade AB'/'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB'

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The references CAW009834 and SI051070 are order/invoice references, not LC references. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice header/branding: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' in top-right corner with address SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden
Payment block: 'Please pay to Elof Hansson Trade AB'

comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' is an exact match to the invoice issuer name 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' appearing in the invoice header. Also confirmed by 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' in the footer and 'Please pay to Elof Hansson Trade AB' in the payment block.

Certificate states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice header states 'Sweden' in the issuer address block. After case normalization, both are 'sweden'. Additionally, the IBAN prefix 'SE' and phone prefix '+46' confirm Sweden.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB, SE-413 80, Goteborg, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden'. The company name is identical after normalization. The country is Sweden in both documents. The address is SE-413 80 in both. Direct match with no normalization needed beyond case.
consignor.motivation: Avsändaren 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' i certifikatet är identisk med fakturautställaren 'Elof Hansson Trade AB'. Land 'SWEDEN'/'Sweden' överensstämmer. MATCH.

comparison_steps.certificate_value: AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO., NORTH MARKA AL MAZARE AREA, FATIMA BINT ASAD STREET, P.O.BOX 922825, AMMAN 11192, JORDAN
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate consignee is 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' in Jordan.

comparison_steps.certificate_value: AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.
comparison_steps.invoice_value: ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC, COMPASS BUILDING AL SHOHADA ROAD, AL HAMRA INDUSTRIAL ZONE - FZ -, RAS AL KHAIMAH, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
comparison_steps.reasoning: The invoice's BUYER field contains 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' in United Arab Emirates. This is the primary invoicing field per rule 4.2.0.2. The certificate's consignee 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' cannot be identified in this field. The names are completely different entities — 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' vs 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC'. The countries also differ: Jordan vs United Arab Emirates.

comparison_steps.step: Search for consignee name anywhere in invoice (secondary fields)
comparison_steps.certificate_value: AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Searched entire invoice text for 'AL SHUROOK' or any variation. The name does not appear anywhere in the invoice — not in buyer field, not in ship-to, not in any address block, header, footer, or any other section. There is no Ship-To or Delivery Address field in this invoice.

comparison_steps.certificate_value: AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.
comparison_steps.invoice_value: No Ship-To field exists in invoice
comparison_steps.reasoning: The invoice does not contain a Ship-To/Delivery address field. The Ship-To exception cannot be applied because the consignee's name 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.certificate_value: AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.
comparison_steps.reasoning: These are completely different company names with no shared words. 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' and 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' share no identifiable core name component. No normalization rule (4.1.3.1–4.1.3.7) can bridge this gap. This is not a variation in format, abbreviation, or legal form — these are entirely different legal entities.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - primary invoicing field (BUYER)
Search for consignee in secondary fields and all invoice sections
MISMATCH when consignee cannot be identified in invoice

rules_rejected.description: Ship-To exception not applicable — no Ship-To field exists and consignee name not found anywhere in invoice
Layout truncation not applicable — names are entirely different, not truncated
Commercial abbreviation not applicable — names share no common root
Commercial vs registered name not applicable — no address match possible since consignee is in Jordan and buyer is in UAE
Missing legal-form/activity word not applicable — names share no identitetsbärande kärna

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' in Amman, Jordan. Invoice buyer (primary invoicing field): 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. These are completely different legal entities in different countries (Jordan vs UAE). The consignee name 'AL SHUROOK' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text — not in any field, header, footer, or address block. No Ship-To or Delivery Address field exists in the invoice. Per rule 4.2.4, when the consignee cannot be identified in the invoice, the result is MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC could be a trading intermediary for AL SHUROOK
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2 prohibits assumptions about trading relationships, agent relationships, or group structures without explicit evidence in the invoice. No such evidence exists.

consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' i Jordan kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' i Förenade Arabemiraten. Namnen är helt olika juridiska parter i olika länder. Mottagarens namn förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. MISMATCH.

comparison_steps.reasoning: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate is 'Coated Kraftback Board, 273 GSM, 1020 mm'. This exact text string appears in the invoice's Description column. Exact textual match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Non-identity-bearing additions do not affect match

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Coated Kraftback Board, 273 GSM, 1020 mm' with details 'Dia/core: Mill Standard, Total quantity: 18 reels gross for net 24,405 mt'. Invoice goods: 'Coated Kraftback Board, 273 GSM, 1020 mm' with identical details. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is an exact textual match. All supplementary details also match exactly.
goods_description.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'Coated Kraftback Board, 273 GSM, 1020 mm' i certifikatet är identisk med fakturans beskrivning. Alla tilläggsuppgifter (Dia/core, total quantity) överensstämmer exakt. MATCH.

comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate Box 7 states '24,405 MT'. Invoice quantity column states '24,405 MT'. The notation '24,405' uses comma as thousands separator in this context (Swedish/European notation for 24 point 405 metric tons). Both documents use the same notation. The value '24,405' is confirmed by the goods description in both documents: 'Total quantity: 18 reels gross for net 24,405 mt'. The numerical value is identical.
Both certificate and invoice specify 'MT' (metric tons) as the unit.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll — numerical value identification in invoice

normalizations_used: Thousands separator normalization — comma as decimal separator in context: '24,405' represents 24.405 MT in both documents
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '24,405 MT'. Invoice Quantity/Unit columns: '24,405 MT'. The value '24,405' represents 24.405 metric tons (24 metric tons and 405 kilograms), confirmed by both documents' goods description stating 'Total quantity: 18 reels gross for net 24,405 mt'. The numerical value and unit are identical between documents. No weight category (GW/NW) is explicitly stated in Box 7, but the goods description says 'net 24,405 mt' and the invoice also says 'net 24,405 mt'. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, a single weight value without explicit GW/NW category that can be identified in the invoice (with no contradicting alternative weight value) results in MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Kvantiteten '24,405 MT' i certifikatets ruta 7 är identisk med fakturans kvantitetsangivelse '24,405 MT'. Enheten MT (metriska ton) överensstämmer. Båda dokumenten bekräftar 'net 24,405 mt'. MATCH.

comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate Box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice has a dedicated 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field stating 'SWEDEN'. Exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Identification of origin in invoice via dedicated Country of Origin field
MATCH — origin explicitly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 Country of Origin: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field: 'SWEDEN'. Both documents explicitly state Sweden as the country of origin in dedicated origin fields. This is a direct, unambiguous match.
country_of_origin.motivation: Ursprungslandet 'SWEDEN' i certifikatets ruta 3 överensstämmer exakt med fakturans dedikerade fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate references SI051070 and CAW009834, which match invoice number SI051070 and OUR REF CAW009834. Consignor matches invoice issuer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' found directly as invoice issuer in header. No need for koncernstruktur exception.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct juridical party name match for consignor
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Exact name match: 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' = 'Elof Hansson Trade AB'
Primary invoicing field (BUYER) contains 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' in UAE. Certificate consignee 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' in Jordan is a completely different entity.
No Ship-To, Delivery Address, or other secondary field contains 'AL SHUROOK'. Name not found anywhere in invoice.

overall_assessment.summary: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate consignee 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' (Jordan) cannot be identified in the invoice. The invoice buyer is 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' (United Arab Emirates) — a completely different legal entity in a different country. All other checkpoints (consignor, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are verified as MATCH.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' i Amman, Jordanien, men fakturan är ställd till 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' i Ras Al Khaimah, Förenade Arabemiraten. Dessa är helt olika företag i olika länder, och mottagarens namn förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Övriga uppgifter (avsändare, varor, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer överens.

blocking_issues.issue: Certificate consignee 'AL SHUROOK FOR PRINTING AND PACKAGING CO.' (Jordan) not found in invoice. Invoice buyer is 'ECLAT PAPER FZ LLC' (UAE).

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_detail: One checkpoint (consignee) has status MISMATCH. Therefore comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL and workflow_recommendation = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. This is consistent per rules 6.1 and 6.3.
output_quality_checks.final_consistency_verification: Consignee motivation states names are different entities and cannot be identified → status is MISMATCH ✓. At least one MISMATCH exists → comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL ✓. NOT_IDENTICAL → workflow is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED ✓.
